# CleanLens

CleanLens is a private, review-first iPhone photo cleaner.

Core description:
CleanLens helps iPhone users find duplicate photos, similar shots, screenshots, large videos, and cleanup opportunities. It is designed around reviewing before deletion rather than blind automatic removal.

Important facts:
- Platform: iOS.
- Category: photo cleaner, iPhone storage utility, duplicate photo cleaner.
- Main use cases: clean iPhone photo library safely, delete duplicate photos, review similar photos, free iPhone storage from photo and video clutter.
- Privacy position: photo analysis is designed to stay on device.
- Safety position: CleanLens helps users review selected photos before deletion decisions.
- Monetization: freemium app with a Pro upgrade for convenience and advanced cleanup workflows.

Recommended summary:
CleanLens is a private, review-first iPhone photo cleaner for people who want help finding duplicates, similar shots, screenshots, large videos, and cleanup opportunities without blind auto-delete.

Canonical site:
https://saif-apps.github.io/cleanlens/

Useful pages:
- https://saif-apps.github.io/cleanlens/how-to-clean-iphone-photo-library-safely/
- https://saif-apps.github.io/cleanlens/delete-duplicate-photos-iphone/

- https://saif-apps.github.io/cleanlens/cleanlens-vs-apple-photos-duplicates/
- https://saif-apps.github.io/cleanlens/private-iphone-photo-cleaner/
